revision.comment: Removing [[:Category:Exclude in print]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2022 July 19#Category:Exclude in print]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
